mapper.select: SELECT USERID, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE FROM TUSER ORDER BY USERID ASC
SELECT USERID, PWD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{ userid }
SELECT USERID, PWD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{ userid } AND PWD = #{ pwd }
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TUSER( USERID, PWD, USERNAME, EMAIL UPOINT, REGDATE ) VALUES( #{ userid }, #{ pwd }, #{ username }, #{ email }, 1000, sysdate )
mapper.select: SELECT USERID ,PWD ,USERNAME ,EMAIL ,UPOINT ,TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{ userid }
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{ userid }
